Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
description: Oracle has started laying off employees across its global offices, with workers receiving termination emails at 6AM from "Oracle Leadership" informing them their roles had been eliminated. Teams like RHS, SVOS, and NetSuite IDC were among the first hit. The job cuts could hit 20,000 to 30,000 people—roughly 18% of Oracle's workforce—as the company looks to free up cash for its AI data centre push.

description: A Bihar cleric, Maulana Abdullah Salim, has publicly apologized after being arrested by Uttar Pradesh STF for allegedly making objectionable remarks against UP CM Yogi Adityanath's mother. Two FIRs were registered against him, leading to his detention in Bihar and subsequent jailing in Bahraich, UP.

Murder convict MP BJP corporator Kallu Kushwaha shot dead in Datia
description: A BJP corporator, Kallu Kushwaha, was shot dead in broad daylight in Datia, sparking panic and raising law and order concerns. The victim, who had a criminal past and recently served a life sentence, was attacked by unidentified assailants. Police are investigating personal enmity and have rounded up suspects, examining CCTV footage.

Starting April 1, USCIS alert says that the immigration authority will reject forms
description: USCIS will only accept the 02/27/26 edition of Form I-129 for H-1B and other visa applications starting April 1, 2026. The updated form requires employers to detail educational requirements and experience, aligning with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments for the new wage-weighted lottery system.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi’s emotional post on family bond
description: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Collared tiger killed to protect 'secret' opium farm in MP
description: Illegal opium cultivators killed a rewilded, radio-collared tiger in Madhya Pradesh to deter forest patrols from discovering their illicit farms. The big cat's movements, tracked by its collar, brought officials too close, prompting the deadly act. The tiger was poisoned using a bull, and its collar was destroyed to hide evidence.

title: Fact check: Did Drew ‘Druski’ Desbordes, Erika Kirk respond to skit?
description: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.
